    "DP impulse lines sloped incorrectly for the service type",
    "Gas taps located below the pipe centerline, risking liquid accumulation in lines",
    "Liquid taps located on top of the pipe, risking gas pocket entrapment in lines"

  "actions": [
    "Isolate the transmitter and impulse lines following site safety and permit procedures",
    "Re-route or re-install the impulse lines and taps to match API RP 551 standards for the specific process phase",
    "Vent/drain the lines and recalibrate/zero the transmitter before returning to service"
  ],
  "rationale": "The DP impulse lines are sloped incorrectly for the process service (gas taps below the pipe and liquid taps on top). This classic installation error leads to liquid pocketing in gas lines or gas pocketing in liquid lines, causing false head pressure, erratic readings, and measurement failure.",
  "references": [
    "API RP 551",
    "Manufacturer Installation Manuals"
  ]
